links.evidence: | year = 2015 | title=A new classification of the pied woodpeckers assemblage (Dendropicini, Picidae) based on a comprehensive multi-locus phylogeny | journal=Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution | volume=88 | pages=28–37 | doi=10.1016/j.ympev.2015.03.016 | pmid=25818851}} It is in the Dendropicos genus, which comprises small woodpeckers native to Sub-Saharan Africa
